patches.summary: ClearTokens now removes persisted API-key auth fields during logout.
patches.reason: The generated logout path only cleared OAuth token fields, leaving saved ElevenLabs API keys active after auth logout.

patches.summary: AuthHeader no longer performs a duplicated unreachable empty-key check.
patches.reason: The generated api_key path checked the same field twice after copying it to a local token variable.

patches.summary: dialogue cast --timestamps now defaults to false.
patches.reason: The default should use the normal audio endpoint unless callers explicitly request timestamp extraction.
